{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061144489B0993993D21511142"}"},"total":7264},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133618567928726303","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个才是真正的海军文，我喜欢这种做事风格。像那种杀海贼还分人？还欣赏逃兵王的我是真不理解。要不就像黄猿啥也不管就摸鱼，要不就像赤犬绝对的正义。我特喜欢这样的文(黄猿的摸鱼我觉得就是那种工作不认真就等拿工资的人一样游戏人生的态度所以我也挺喜欢黄猿的)","text_exts":[{"e":110,"s":106,"text":"游戏人生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413110421511142%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227133618567928726303%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227076389015544400900%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660925160,"group_id":"7076389015544400900","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyVmOgDy07ffeTiCLhciA65KfvUBcnJWI+4QEiRmJZDI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2027973551079160","user_name":"爱吃蒸鸡蛋的宁寂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2027973551079160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1660371329,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7076389015544400900","book_info":{"abstract":"罗杰被处刑后，在东海沉寂十年的穿越者迪伦十年如一日剿灭海贼。
让东海依旧保持着“最弱之海”的称号。
当命运的齿轮开始转动，迪伦进入新世界。
黑胡子：“人的梦想是不······”
迪伦：“你说什么？你的梦想是什么？”
黑胡子：“我没有梦想，我就想在老爹船上养老。”

e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315104&x-signature=ii4kksfK4YfOtdXj%2FkPAkvBe2ZQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"396291564373628","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.897331e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061144489B0993993D21511142"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18596,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24493,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":49909},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7161375852671206152","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"牛逼，这才是我想的海贼，一腔热血可以让小时候的我们热血沸腾，但是长大的我们会深思，主角他们做的就真的好吗，看在主角的角度，勇闯监狱救哥哥很重感情，但是放在人民的角度呢，那些罪犯难道他们会金盆洗手？，赤犬杀了那个爱笑的艾斯，是我们童年的遗憾，可是放在海军的角度呢，它不仅没错，还干的漂亮，杀了一个要逃刑的杀人犯，这使多少人免于死亡，作者他本人对海贼的思考，更值得我们欣赏，虽然风格严肃压抑，但是他写出了真实，说出很多人说的一句话，尾田他就是一个画漫画的，他懂个屁海贼","text_exts":[{"e":97,"s":93,"text":"金盆洗手","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%87%91%E7%9B%86%E6%B4%97%E6%89%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413110421511142%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227161375852671206152%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227076389015544400900%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%87%91%E7%9B%86%E6%B4%97%E6%89%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667387824,"group_id":"7076389015544400900","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"啊这","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N953oDqv8fyZQLcMfUrE+H2VF3Sr4WhOc0acNT9JPIXR","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0
